title: Calycomelia acuminata
taxonomy: Calycomelia acuminata is classified in the following manner: it belongs to the family Apocynaceae, is a species of the genus Calycomelia, and is native to Mexico. The plant is further classified as a type of flowering plant, which is a part of the larger category of angiosperms. Within the family Apocynaceae, Calycomelia acuminata is related to other plants such as the periwinkle and the oleander. Calycomelia acuminata is also classified as a perennial plant, meaning it grows and flowers over multiple years. Its classification is based on its physical characteristics, growth habits, and genetic makeup.
